column1:
"
Model API Adapters
==================
Unified interface for GPT-4o, Claude, Gemini, and Llama (via together.ai or local).
Each adapter exposes a single `.complete(prompt, system, max_tokens, temperature)` method
returning (text, latency_ms, usage_dict).

All adapters are lazy-import: the SDK is only imported when the adapter is instantiated,
so you only need to install the SDKs for the models you actually evaluate.
"
